TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tjatjigel, title = Tjatjigel, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjatjigel} }

S.FORM: Tjatjigel Itiniay i Taimali Cen no Taitung ko Tjatjigel a niyaro', 354 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 780 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 79% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 616 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 21% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 164 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis11%, Paiwan66%, Puyuma1%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tjatji*…ô…ĺ itiniaj i taima…ĺi ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u tjatji*…ô…ĺ a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis**%, paiwan**%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Tjatjigel Itiniay i Taimali Cen no Taitung ko Tjatjigel a niyaro', 354 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 780 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 79% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 616 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 21% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 164 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis11%, Paiwan66%, Puyuma1%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tjatji*…ô…ĺ itiniaj i taima…ĺi ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u tjatji*…ô…ĺ a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis**%, paiwan**%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
